title: Cubric Studio Docs subdomain + finish docs site
description: Implementable docs.cubric.studio launch and docs-site completion plan. Phase 0 is a cooperation gate: user/dev handles Namecheap and GitHub Pages settings; agent handles repo, content, search shell, assets, and verification.

attention.reason: Implementation needs a live cooperation checkpoint for DNS and GitHub Pages settings that cannot be completed from the local workspace alone.
